core_payload.content:
# Task: The Atomic Unit of Work

## 1. Role
Task is a sharper execution atom for N1Hub, carrying enough context, evidence expectation, timing posture, and dependency clarity to support a predictive operating system for action.

## 2. Task Contract
Tasks improve decomposition quality, effort realism, definition-of-done discipline, dependency semantics, branch targeting, reminder coupling, and coordination between human assignees and bounded agent lanes.

## 3. Operational Consequence
Execution quality improves because the smallest useful work unit stops being vague. Tasks remain clear enough to track, delegate, review, and complete honestly across human and agent effort.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Task supports To Dig Deep by making atomic work clearer, more accountable, and more useful instead of merely more numerous.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Task defines the atomic execution unit that lets N1Hub turn goals and plans into bounded, reviewable work. It covers decomposition quality, dependency semantics, definition-of-done discipline, realistic effort expectations, reminder coupling, and coordination across human assignees and agent lanes. The capsule matters because execution quality depends on the smallest work object being explicit enough to track, delegate, review, and complete honestly. It keeps action from collapsing into vague intent or unbounded backlog noise.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped future-meta phrasing so the capsule states present execution doctrine directly.
